title.en: A simple Dashboard with Tailwind CSS
title.es: Un dashboard sencillo en Tailwind CSS

description.en: Build a responsive dashboard with HTML and Tailwind CSS that shows KPIs, drivers, and operational details so the artist can oversee their ticket business. Semantic HTML, responsive layout; HTML and Tailwind only (no React).
description.es: Crea un dashboard responsivo con HTML y Tailwind CSS que muestre KPIs, drivers y detalles operativos para que el artista supervise su negocio de entradas. HTML semántico, diseño responsivo; solo HTML y Tailwind (sin React).
